expectations.evidence: Mentions 'engineering background is an advantage' briefly but no structured anchor points section mapping specific eng concepts to PM equivalents
Some implicit bridges (mentions mindset shifts from builder to enabler) but not explicit concept-to-concept mapping
Lists PM responsibilities but not a structured domain landscape with areas, relationships, and vocabulary per area
'First 30 days plan' broken into weekly goals — addresses the urgency well
Has a 30-day plan but not a domain-area priority map (start/next/later by domain area)
